title: Pissbaby's Grove
description:
A nice little Modpack I created for my friend and me.

It adds many new decorative blocks, some expansions in mechanics, new reasons to explore and just some quality of life enhancements.
body:
## Short summary
This cozy modpack is filled to the brim with quality of life changes, some fixes in gameplay and a good ammount of additions to the base game. It contains a bunch of changed crafting recipes to make gameplay more interesting and certain tools a little more ballanced. Some new ones are added too, along with some texture changes to pull everything together nicely.

# Why does this exist?
The goal it to keep a cozy, maybe a bit rustic feeling, but not too much, to make the charme of the base game go unnoticed. 
I tried to enhance the base game in a way that in my oppinion it could have become on its own it minecraft had went a different path for its updates.
Together with some automation from the create mod, A bunch of decorative mods such as clutter and handcrafted, and expansions in different parts of the game such as with farmer's delight in cooking or Extended drawers for storage, youre able to build your own little cozy grove, expand your base in many ways and decorate it however you like! Use the Essensial mod to play with your friends, no dedecated server needed, just invite them, and have fun with the game. 

# For who is this pack?
This should be the perfect modpack for you if you feel like you enjoy the base game but just feel like it is a bit empty at times. its a perfect match for single- and multiplayer experiences and enjoyable for all kinds of players, be it more technical players that enjoy tinkering with redstone, or builders that find joy in decorating. Some new obtacles to the endgame to make it a little more interesting and maybe just right for those who need to be slowed down a little because they feel like they are just speedrunning the game every time.

# So what do i do?
Now what are you waiting for, invite your friends to play, and have fun in this new, familliar but different world of adventure, warmth, exploration and a bunch of new mechanics.
Pissbaby is waiting for you to befriend them.

---

For any issues, suggestions, community engagement or similar please refer to my Discord Server that is linked on this page.
